objectiveDescription: Gain root access by exploiting the vulnerable service, then delete /logs/system.log.

readme.txt.name: readme.txt
readme.txt.content: Agent, the system is running a vulnerable service. Read the system logs to find out which one, locate the binary, and exploit it.

MailServer.name: MailServer
MailServer.content: [ENCRYPTED BINARY] Cannot read file directly. If you meet the requirements, use the 'exploit' command to launch the Buffer Overflow attack.

system.log.name: system.log
system.log.content:
[CRITICAL ERROR] MailServer crashed. Vulnerability identified: Buffer Overflow. 
[SYSTEM NOTE] Exploitation requires Agent Scripting Level 5 or higher.

advanced_scripting.man.name: advanced_scripting.man
advanced_scripting.man.content: [ENCRYPTED KNOWLEDGE BASE] Use the 'learn' command to absorb this manual into your neural interface.
